case_title: NAIM JAMALI VS. CHARLIE WALKER et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF JAMALI, NAIM
GENERAL DENIAL FILED BY DEFENDANT WALKER, CHARLIE
ARBITRATOR'S FEE STATEMENT SENT TO ACCOUNTING FOR LUCY E. BETTIS
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR MAR-01-2004. JAN-02-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE MAR-11-2004.

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. JUDGMENT IS HEREBY ENTERED THAT THE CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NAIM JAMALI IS DENIED. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
